name: Elden Ring
description: An open-world action RPG set in the Lands Between. Prepare to suffer beautifully.

name: Hollow Knight
description: A precise, haunting metroidvania deep beneath the surface of Hallownest.

name: Hades
description: Slash your way out of the Underworld. Die. Try again. Love every minute.

name: Disco Elysium
description: A detective RPG unlike anything else. Think, drink, and accidentally save the world.

name: Celeste
description: Climb a mountain. Master each screen. A platformer about perseverance.
